GTM engineers build on Clay
Reach every buyer by finding all the datapoints possible.
TAM Sourcing
Automated Inbound
Lead Scoring
Automated Outbound
CRM Enrichment
Launch Ads
Rep Productivity
Tab: TAM Sourcing
Find every account in your TAM in one place.
Tab: Automated Inbound
Enrich, score, and route every lead to the right rep in minutes.
Tab: Lead Scoring
Prioritize the highest-converting leads using real-time intent and engagement signals.
Tab: Automated Outbound
Personalize outreach with live intent signals to reach the right buyers at the right time.
Tab: CRM Enrichment
Keep CRM records accurate, complete, and continuously refreshed with live data.
Tab: Launch Ads
Turn top accounts from your CRM into precision ad campaigns on LinkedIn, Meta and Google Ads.
Tab: Rep Productivity
Automate research, prep, and follow-ups to let reps spend time closing deals. 
What do you want to build?
Submit

llm_raw.description: An AI-powered GTM orchestration platform that automates lead research, data enrichment, and multi-channel outreach workflows.
llm_raw.notes: Clay explicitly lists 'Clay MCP' in their feature set, confirming official support for Model Context Protocol. The 'Agent plugin' functionality also suggests a focus on programmatic extensibility.
